title: Account
description: An account in Microsoft Dynamics 365 CRM, representing a business organization such as a customer, competitor, or partner.

accountid.description: The unique identifier of the account.

revenue.description: The annual revenue of the account.

numberofemployees.description: The number of employees at the account.

address1_line1.description: The first line of the primary address.

address1_city.description: The city of the primary address.

address1_stateorprovince.description: The state or province of the primary address.

address1_postalcode.description: The postal code of the primary address.

address1_country.description: The country of the primary address.

statecode.description: The state of the account (0 = Active, 1 = Inactive).

createdon.description: The date and time the account was created.

modifiedon.description: The date and time the account was last modified.
